reviews.review_description: So my name is yummy and I have a friend who WAS friends with the owner Nathan. Around September of last year I was on a call with them and nathan had told me to kill myself and then blocked me. I also found out later that every vr game nathan has made was mostly made by another dude,not Nathan. And also, almost EVERYTHING IS TAKEN OUT OF SCARY BABOON(code, player model, assets, etc) NOTHING IS ORIGINAL. don’t get this game guys all these reviews of him being nice is just him with a fake personality on.  He’s a 13 year old boy who doesn’t deserve any of this, seeing what his actions are.

This game is basically scary baboon 2, here are some things you should probably add, 
Red monster called shredded
Levels and game modes






Sw34tyvr,
